abilities.name: Swagger
abilities.description: At end of turn, gain Defensive +1 if only declared Walk Actions.

abilities.name: The Old Ultraviolence
abilities.description: Deal +1 damage to characters with one+ Conditions.

actions: (1) Gang Weapons (Melee) | AV: 4 (9) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/3 damage. Mask And Then Strolled Away: After, move 3 yards.
(1) B&D Pocket Revolver (Pistol) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: z6 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/3 damage. Mask A Fiver: After damaging, gain Focused +1. Capacity 4, Reload 2.
system.notes: Privileged ne'er-do-wells serving Guild and Ten Thunders. Gambling debts. Handle operations neither faction seen officially. Spy Guild patrol routes.
